description_long: This is a sleek, modern fighter jet with a sharply pointed nose, angular swept-back wings, and a streamlined fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted and feature pronounced anhedral angles, giving the aircraft an aggressive, downward-sloping profile. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy, suggesting a single-seat configuration. The tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers canted outward, connected by a horizontal stabilizer, forming an H-tail design. The engine intakes are integrated into the fuselage near the wing roots, and the undercarriage is not visible, implying retractable landing gear. The exterior is finished in a dark, matte camouflage pattern with subtle panel lines and minimal visible markings.
description: A modern, angular fighter jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, twin vertical stabilizers, and the overall angular, stealthy shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the downward angle of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Front view emphasizing the sharp nose, cockpit placement, and the aggressive anhedral wing configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to view 1, showing the streamlined fuselage and the integration of the wings and tail surfaces.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and pronounced anhedral angles; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the fuselage near the wing roots.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and a connecting horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
